title: Dorema schtschurowskianum

It belongs to the genus Dorema, which is a group of plants commonly known as giant fennels or giant caraways. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
